response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements achieved during the game's redevelopment. Although we have successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by implementing optimization features in the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balance between these features.  
Image #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character possesses a specific stomach capacity that dictates the amount of "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowel. For instance, Dr. Anya can retain up to 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of semen during climax: a Dreamer typically expels around 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may transfer 400-600ml into their partner.  
Images #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice visual effects. These fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character abilities, resulting from experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  
Images #4 and #5 depict real-time body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands manipulated via a VR controller.  
Images #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage equipment and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the upcoming month.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
